---
title: "Assignment 1"
author: "Yahya Eren Kaya"
date: "2026-03-10"
---


**Video:** Veri Bilimi ve Endüstri Mühendisliği Üzerine Sohbetler - Baykal Hafızoğlu & Erdi Daşdemir

**Summary:** We saw how analytical categories are divided and which courses fall into which categories. We also saw what we need to pay attention to in the long term, especially when writing a thesis, what the KPI is, and the importance of problem definition.

**Q1- What is the difference between Out of the box and custom made software?**

**Answer:** Out of the box software provides the same standard product to everyone, while custom made software is built specifically for a single customer.

**Q2- Which of the following uses Machine Learning as a core component?**

a) Descriptive Analytics

b) Diagnostic Analytics

c) Predictive Analytics

d) Prescriptive Analytics

**Answer:** C

---
**Code Task**

```{r}
library(dslabs)
data("polls_us_election_2016")

my_first <- "Yahya Eren"
my_birth_year <- 2002

k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  print(head(polls_us_election_2016, k))
} else {
  print(tail(polls_us_election_2016, k))
}

# Tüm veri setindeki toplam NA (eksik veri) sayısını hesaplayıp yazdırır
print(sum(is.na(polls_us_election_2016)))

# Sütun bazında NA sayılarını toplayıp büyükten küçüğe sıralar ve en çok NA içeren ilk 8 sütunu yazdırır
print(head(sort(colSums(is.na(polls_us_election_2016)), decreasing = TRUE), 8))

new_data <- polls_us_election_2016

for (col in names(new_data)) {
  if (is.numeric(new_data[[col]])) {
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- my_birth_year + k
  } else if (is.character(new_data[[col]]) | is.factor(new_data[[col]])) {
    new_data[[col]] <- as.character(new_data[[col]])
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
  }
}

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  print(head(new_data, k))
} else {
  print(tail(new_data, k))
}

print(sum(is.na(new_data)))

print(anyNA(new_data)) 
```
